notifications.prayerTestBody: This is how prayer alerts will appear.
notifications.readingPlanBody: Keep your Quran plan active today with a short reading session.
notifications.readingPlanTestBody: Open the app and complete your reading plan for today.

localizationSetup.title: Set up your reading experience
localizationSetup.subtitle: Choose app language and Quran display preferences.
localizationSetup.stepLanguageBody: This controls navigation, settings, prayer labels, and notifications.
localizationSetup.stepModeBody: You can change this later in settings.
localizationSetup.stepTranslationBody: Quran content language stays separate from the app interface.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Typography and preferences.
settings.languageRegionSubtitle: App language, region, and calendar preferences.
settings.notificationsSubtitle: Manage reminders, prayer times, and adhan sound.
settings.cloudSubtitle: Sync bookmarks and favorites across devices.
settings.translationLanguageSubtitle: Choose the Quran translation language independently from the app language.
settings.showTransliterationSubtitle: Display pronunciation guidance between Arabic and translation.
settings.tafsirLanguageSubtitle: Choose the language used for tafsir content.
settings.appLanguageSubtitle: Navigation, buttons, settings, and notifications follow this language.
settings.verseLayoutSubtitle: Choose how verses are displayed. Mushaf shows a printed-page style.

surah.loadErrorBody: Check your connection and try again.
surah.offlineCopyBody: Showing downloaded text. Connect to update.
surah.mushafViewBody: Printed-page style. Tap any verse to bookmark, favorite, or open tafsir.
surah.chooseVerseAction: Choose an action for this verse.

readingPlan.title: Reading Plan
readingPlan.subtitle: Set plan duration and daily reminder.
readingPlan.startPrompt: Start a guided reading plan and track completion as you read each day.
readingPlan.catchUpSuggestion: Catch-up suggestion: complete {{count}} extra day this week to return on track.
readingPlan.catchUpSuggestion_other: Catch-up suggestion: complete {{count}} extra days this week to return on track.
readingPlan.weeklyReviewSummary: {{completed}} days completed in the last 7 days. {{missed}} missed.
readingPlan.weeklyCatchUpSuffix: · Catch-up: complete {{count}} extra day this week.
readingPlan.weeklyCatchUpSuffix_other: · Catch-up: complete {{count}} extra days this week.
readingPlan.weeklyOnTargetSuffix: · You are on target this week.
readingPlan.milestonesEmpty: Keep reading daily to unlock milestones and badges.
readingPlan.planHistoryEmpty: Finished or reset plans will appear here.
readingPlan.dailyReminderBody: Get a reminder notification to complete your plan.
readingPlan.alertStartPlanBody: Enable a reading plan before scheduling reminders.
readingPlan.alertPermissionBody: Enable notifications to receive reading plan reminders.
readingPlan.alertPermissionTestBody: Enable notifications to send a test.
readingPlan.alertScheduledBody: Reading plan reminders are set. ({{count}} upcoming)
